The high readiness scores (84.5/100) indicate good capacity for vestibular rehabilitation.

The high readiness scores (79-89) confirm strong recovery capacity, suggesting your current protocol of electrolytes, breathing exercises, and graded activity is effectively supporting autonomic regulation.

All days show sufficient recovery metrics to support gaze stabilization and balance training without risk of overwhelming the system.
